transcript.text:
[Birthday Party Alone]
[Cake from her older brother]
Ice cream cakes are my favorite
Do I sing it to myself?
Come sing it
[Make a wish!]
Hello everyone~
It's my birthday today 4.25
So my mom made me a birthday meal
[Food monster is here! Go Away!]
[Only because it's your birthday today]
My mom made me delicious dishes for me
So I will be eating it
Seaweed Soup
Eel
Zucchini pancake, braised short ribs

Why is the salad here?
Webfoot octopus, japchae (glass noodles with veggies)
What is this..?
That looks scrumptious
This is the braised short ribs (beef)
With 1++ grade meat
[Mukbang starts with meat]
It's completely different than a regular short rib
It's very juicy and delicious
So good Webfoot octopus
Mom, this tastes so good
It's yummy
You can talk
Is it good? Yes it is
Very good
Eel

We have eels?
I bought that
You did?
It's good
Yeah they're good at it
Really?
I mean yeah, how can you make this at home?
Zucchini pancake
Japchae
My mom's really good at this
I already know before I taste it
I actually ate some earlier
Yes, I came home
Is this a salad..?
[Just 1 tomato]
Let's put a little bit of salt

[How much is "little bit"?]
It's perfect
[Just like the ocean]
[Some water to wash it down]
Why did you put carrots in here?
Sliced carrots usually go in there
What is this?
Korean mountain herb
It gets better
It tastes like watercress
Kids' taste buds
Why? More water
It's okay
I don't really eat this too often But it's tasty
Idk if it's because you used 1++ grade meat
I've never had anything like it

I shouldn't use 1++ grade meat for it anymore It's too greasy
I really like it
You're supposed to put this
Put some rice in here
You guys know that the more you cook the seaweed soup, it gets better?
Some kimchi
Webfoot octopus head
It's not a baby octopus
Mom,
Someone is calling you mother-in-law
I'm not sure what to say to that
Is this an abalone?
Your cooking skills improved
Improved? You kidding me?
I mean, compared to when I was little
Well, that's because I was too busy working

I can never forget that dish you made
Do you remember the pork backbone stew?
You don't know the true flavor of it It was superb
No way!
You don't even know how to eat it
The short ribs though Really
It's insane
I ate dinner earlier with the family
[2nd dinner..]
Eel
The dogs are here Right below me
[Did you call me?]
I have to push this away
Perilla leaf
Did you eat it?
I wonder how many servings this is

Mom
Can the 3 of you finish all of this? (Mom, dad, brother)
As it is right now? No, from how it was before
We can't
Do you eat salad as a part of a meal?
I did it just for your birthday
[Why...]
I see
This one is just like me
He loves eating
Tasty
[Communicating]
Sit
[Chat: Bichon are very smart]
I don't believe that
Our Sogeum is smart!

No he's not
It's just to you
He's very obedient
No way~
Smart dogs are usually rebellious
There are a lot of abalones here
[Time to refill water]
Sit still, okay?
Sogeum, no
He won't move
He had a lot of snacks already
He needs to stop eating
Mom made everything except for the eel, right?
Perilla leaf too?
Why do you ask about the perilla leaf?
Because grandma usually makes them

Well it's because I don't usually make them
3 zucchini pancakes
I'm eating the veggies because mom made prepared them for me
He looks like a human
My friends ask me if he's still working as a part-time dog
Because he acts like a human
Webfoot octopus
It's really good and tender
[Sogeum is pissed]
I finished the meat and the abalone
1 more webfoot octopus left
It's kind of spicy
Last one
I finished all the salad
Thanks everyone~
Thank you mom
